channel.title: GitHub Makefile Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Makefile in GitHub

item.title: PostgresApp/PostgresApp
item.description: The easiest way to get started with PostgreSQL on the Mac

item.title: theos/theos
item.description: A cross-platform suite of tools for building and deploying software for iOS and other platforms.

item.title: SynoCommunity/spksrc
item.description: Cross compilation framework to create native packages for the Synology's NAS

item.title: HaveAGitGat/Tdarr
item.description: Tdarr - Distributed transcode automation using FFmpeg/HandBrake + Audio/Video library analytics + video health checking (Windows, macOS, Linux & Docker)

item.title: foostan/crkbd
item.description: Corne keyboard, a split keyboard with 3x6 column staggered keys and 3 thumb keys.

item.title: cncf/people
item.description: Stores the data that will populate the various people listings on cncf.io

item.title: waveaccounting/terraform-aws-chatbot-slack-configuration
item.description: Module to enable Chatbot Slack channel configuration in Terraform

item.title: instill-ai/instill-core
item.description: 🔮 Instill Core is a full-stack AI infrastructure tool for data, model and pipeline orchestration, designed to streamline every aspect of building versatile AI-first applications
